StepAction: build_responses_request assembles all 14 ResponsesApiRequest fields (model, instructions, input, tools, tool_choice='auto', parallel_tool_calls, reasoning, store=Azure-only, stream=true, include[], service_tier?, text?)
prompt_cache_key = Some(state.thread_id.to_string()) — pure thread_id, no mix-in

build_responses_options seeds extra_headers via build_responses_headers (beta_features + turn_state + turn_metadata) + build_responses_identity_headers (window_id + parent_thread_id + subagent + memgen) + optional attestation
stream_request adds x-client-request-id (= thread_id), session_id/session-id/thread_id/thread-id (both forms), and subagent label header; serialises request body to serde_json::Value
Hand body + headers to transport (Ch07 HTTP SSE OR Ch08 WebSocket per provider.supports_websockets gate)
